ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the publisher */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* The official website URL of the publisher */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* The URL to the publisher's logo */,
  "total_characters" INTEGER /* The total number of characters published by the publisher */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the publisher record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the publisher record was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the publisher record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the publisher record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Alignment of the character (good or bad) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character (male or female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the character */,
  "first_appearance" TEXT /* The first appearance of the character in a comic book */,
  "abilities" TEXT /* A list of special abilities or powers of the character */,
  "alter_ego" TEXT /* The alter ego or secret identity of the character */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the popularity of the character */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the character record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the character record was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the character record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the character record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character profile */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character the profile belongs to */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the character */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the character's image */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the profile */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the profile was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the profile */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the profile was last modified */,
  "height" TEXT /* The height of the character */,
  "weight" TEXT /* The weight of the character */,
  "eye_color" TEXT /* The eye color of the character */,
  "hair_color" TEXT /* The hair color of the character */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The nationality of the character */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* The place of birth of the character */,
  "affiliations" TEXT /* A list of affiliations or groups the character is associated with */,
  "enemies" TEXT /* A list of enemies or adversaries of the character */,
  "allies" TEXT /* A list of allies or friends of the character */,
  "total_appearances" INTEGER /* The total number of appearances of the character in comics, films, etc. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_profiles_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)
